item.title: 油价逼近100美元的威胁意味着逢低买入美股风险高企
item.description: 如同钟表般精准，华尔街策略师和投资者正重拾传统策略——该策略指出，由突发地缘政治事件引发的股市下跌，几乎总是绝佳的买入时机。【原文：Like clockwork, Wall Street strategists and investors are turning to a traditional playbook that says stock-market dips triggered by sudden geopolitical flareups are almost always good buying opportunities.】

item.title: 今天是通胀日
item.description: 叙事再次转向。【原文：The narrative turns again.】

item.title: 耶伦认为鉴于伊朗冲突风险 美联储将"更趋于按兵不动"
item.description: 前财政部长珍妮特·耶伦表示，根据伊朗冲突影响石油市场的时间长短，美国经济增长将受到冲击，通胀压力将加剧，这将使美联储的工作更加复杂。【原文：Former Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen said, depending on how long the Iran conflict affects the oil market, there will be both a hit to US economic growth and an increase in inflationary pressures, complicating the job for the Federal Reserve.】

item.title: 哥伦比亚将对厄瓜多尔数百种商品征收50%关税
item.description: 哥伦比亚政府计划对厄瓜多尔进口商品征收50%的对等关税，加剧了这两个意识形态对立国家之间损害经济的争端。【原文：Colombia’s government is planning reciprocal tariffs of 50% on imports from Ecuador, intensifying an economically-damaging spat between the ideological foes.】

item.title: 马斯克旗下xAI公司将在IPO前夕提前回购30亿美元债务
item.description: 知情人士及彭博社汇编数据显示，埃隆·马斯克旗下的人工智能初创公司xAI计划提前偿还30亿美元垃圾债券。【原文：Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence startup xAI is planning to pay back $3 billion of junk bonds early, according to people with knowledge of the matter and data compiled by Bloomberg.】

item.title: 在美方监督下，委内瑞拉2月原油出口量翻倍
item.description: 委内瑞拉2月份石油出口量大幅增长，出口量较上月翻了一番。上月正是特朗普政府首次对该国原油销售实施管控之时。【原文：Venezuela sharply increased its oil exports in February, sending roughly twice as many barrels abroad compared with the previous month, when the Trump administration first exerted control of the country’s crude sales.】

item.title: 特朗普对伊朗开战可能给美国经济和选民带来新的冲击
item.description: 距离中期选举仅剩八个月之际，唐纳德·特朗普总统对伊朗的战争可能给本已令选民失望的经济再添一记重击。【原文：President Donald Trump’s war against Iran risks delivering another shock to an economy that voters are already disenchanted with, just eight months out from mid-term elections.】

item.title: 游客涌向阿曼、沙特阿拉伯以避开迪拜的危险
item.description: 阿曼首都马斯喀特通常被旅行者视为邻近迪拜及其炫目摩天大楼的文化对立面。但如今这座城市正吸引着另一类游客：因领空关闭滞留的旅客，他们不惜支付高额费用也要撤离。【原文：The city of Muscat in Oman is typically targeted by travelers as the cultural counterpoint to nearby Dubai and its glitzy skyscrapers. But now the city is becoming a major draw for a very different kind of visitor: people stranded by airspace closings who are willing to pay a premium to evacuate.】

item.title: 阿瑞斯领衔22亿美元Arcmont二次出售交易
item.description: 据知情人士透露，在二手股权市场中，Ares Management Corp.已成为Arcmont Asset Management出售的私募信贷组合的主要买家。【原文：Ares Management Corp. emerged as the primary buyer for a private credit portfolio sold by Arcmont Asset Management in the market for secondhand stakes, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 伊朗战争中关键中东能源资产遭袭
item.description: 伊朗在波斯湾交错发动的袭击，对关键基础设施和能源输送造成严重破坏。【原文：Iranian attacks criss-crossing the Persian Gulf caused serious disruption to critical infrastructure and energy flows.】

item.title: 伊朗遭袭致油价飙升，特朗普面临政治压力
item.description: 汽油和柴油期货在美以对伊朗发动袭击后的首个交易日大幅上涨，这可能抹杀特朗普总统能源议程中最大的亮点之一。【原文：Gasoline and diesel futures surged on the first day of trading after the US and Israel launched attacks on Iran, threating to blot out one of the biggest bright spots of President Donald Trump’s energy agenda.】

item.title: 伊朗战争引发的石油冲击恐将扰乱非洲经济复苏进程
item.description: 中东冲突的扩大可能促使非洲国家推迟进一步降息，因为油价上涨的威胁重新引发了对通胀的担忧，并可能削弱当地货币。【原文：A widening Middle-East conflict could prompt African nations to delay further interest rate cuts, as the threat of higher oil prices revives concerns about inflation and risks weakening local currencies.】

item.title: 赛勒策略通过普通股增持比特币
item.description: 迈克尔·赛勒的Strategy Inc.公司购入价值逾2亿美元的比特币，尽管曾承诺主要依靠其永久优先股融资，但最终仍转向普通股筹集了大部分收购资金。【原文：Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. bought more than $200 million worth of Bitcoin, turning to common stock to finance the bulk of its acquisitions, despite promises to lean on its perpetual preferred shares.】

item.title: 摩根大通看跌美元立场遭伊朗石油冲击挑战
item.description: 摩根大通外汇策略师表示，随着美伊冲突升级导致中东地区油轮运输陷入瘫痪，油价持续冲击是该行"美元今年将走弱"预期的最大威胁。【原文：A sustained oil price shock as conflict between the US and Iran escalates and snarls tanker traffic across the Middle East is the biggest threat to JPMorgan Chase & Co’s view that the dollar will weaken this year, according to the bank’s foreign-exchange strategists.】

item.title: 南非财政部称可承受伊朗战争等冲击
item.description: 南非国家财政部负责人表示，该国更强劲的公共财政状况为其提供了可观的缓冲空间，足以抵御外部冲击——例如伊朗冲突引发的连锁反应。【原文：South Africa’s stronger public finances have given the county a sizable cushion to absorb external shocks — such as the fallout from the conflict in Iran, according to the head of the National Treasury.】

item.title: 伊朗战争扰乱全球化肥供应关键枢纽
item.description: 伊朗冲突可能扰乱一个重要的化肥生产和运输枢纽，从而推高作物成本并加剧食品通胀风险。【原文：The conflict in Iran threatens to disrupt a major fertilizer production and shipping hub, raising the risk of higher crop costs and food inflation.】

item.title: 布伦特福德足球俱乐部获音乐大亨、黑石高管注资
item.description: 西伦敦英超球队布伦特福德足球俱乐部已获得两位新少数股东的支持：环球音乐集团首席执行官卢西安·格兰杰与黑石集团高级执行官普拉卡什·梅尔瓦尼。【原文：Brentford FC, the West London Premier League team, has secured backing from two new minority investors: Lucian Grainge, the head of Universal Music Group, and Prakash Melwani, a senior executive at Blackstone Inc.】

item.title: 马斯克收购推特前的推文成为新审判焦点
item.description: 埃隆·马斯克2022年试图退出收购推特公司的短暂努力，成为本周开庭审理的焦点。该诉讼指控这位全球首富操纵公司股价以谋取更有利的交易条件。【原文：Elon Musk’s brief effort to back out of buying Twitter Inc. in 2022 is the focus of a trial starting this week over claims the world’s richest person manipulated the company’s stock price to get himself a better deal.】

item.title: 美国制造业增长，伊朗袭击前投入成本飙升
item.description: 美国制造业在2月份实现扩张，但投入价格飙升至2022年以来最快增速，这在周末伊朗遭袭事件发生前就已引发通胀卷土重来的担忧。【原文：US manufacturing expanded in February but input prices soared at the fastest pace since 2022, stoking fears of an inflation resurgence even before this weekend’s attacks on Iran.】

item.title: 富达管理资产规模突破7.1万亿美元，营收跃升15%
item.description: 富达投资作为全球第三大资产管理公司，创下历史最佳业绩：其基金资产规模增长逾1万亿美元，自2024年以来收入飙升15%。【原文：Fidelity Investments, the world’s third-largest asset manager, reported a record year, with assets in its funds rising by more than $1 trillion and revenue jumping 15% since 2024.】

item.title: 摩根大通下周将启动550亿美元收购EA的债务交易
item.description: 据知情人士透露，摩根大通公司将于下周正式启动为艺电公司创纪录杠杆收购案发售银团贷款的流程。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. is set to formally start the process next week of selling syndicated debt for the record leveraged buyout of Electronic Arts Inc., according to a person familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 股市下跌，波动率飙升，交易员权衡伊朗战争风险
item.description: 周一早盘股市下跌，交易员们正评估中东冲突升级带来的市场风险，油价飙升，特朗普总统表示美国和以色列对伊朗的打击行动可能持续数周。【原文：Stocks dropped Monday morning as traders weighed the market risks from an escalating conflict in the Middle East, with oil spiking and President Donald Trump saying the US and Israeli strikes on Iran may last weeks.】

item.title: 冰岛央行行长戴维·奥德松在金融危机期间履职，享年78岁
item.description: 冰岛任职时间最长的总理大卫·奥德松去世，享年78岁。他在该国银行体系崩溃期间曾担任中央银行行长。【原文：David Oddsson, Iceland’s longest-serving prime minister who oversaw its central bank when the nation’s banking system collapsed, has died. He was 78.】

item.title: 中东买家无惧导弹袭击 继续全球采购狂潮
item.description: 中东投资者周一继续其全球收购狂潮，宣布了两笔大额交易，并驳斥了伊朗冲突可能至少在短期内影响该地区交易活动的担忧。【原文：Middle Eastern investors continued their global acquisition spree on Monday, unveiling a pair of big-ticket transactions and brushing off concerns that the Iran conflict could dent regional dealmaking activity at least in the short term.】

item.title: 摩根大通银行家称人工智能将改变信贷市场运作方式
item.description: 摩根大通全球信贷交易主管表示，生成式人工智能将彻底改变信贷交易员的工作方式，因为该技术特别适合处理该资产类别产生的非结构化数据。【原文：Generative AI is set to transform the way credit traders do their jobs, as the technology is well suited to handling the unstructured data produced by the asset class, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s global head of credit trading.】

item.title: 乌兹别克斯坦最大黄金矿商在创纪录价格下延长出口禁令
item.description: 乌兹别克斯坦作为全球最大的黄金生产国之一，在国际地缘政治动荡导致金价创下历史新高之际，已开始囤积其黄金产量。【原文：Uzbekistan, one of the world’s largest gold producers, has taken to hoarding its output of the yellow metal as prices hit records amid global geopolitical turmoil.】

item.title: 美国天然气期货价格随全球天然气、原油价格同步上涨
item.description: 美国天然气期货价格最高上涨7.4%，与全球天然气价格走势一致。受中东地区冲突再度升级以及卡塔尔关闭全球最大液化天然气工厂影响，全球天然气价格已大幅攀升。【原文：US natural gas futures rose as much as 7.4% in sympathy with global gas prices, which have surged in response to renewed conflict in the Middle East and Qatar shutting liquefied natural gas production at the world’s largest LNG plant.】

item.title: 防务公司将启动法兰克福IPO计划，尽管与伊朗存在冲突
item.description: 知情人士透露，尽管中东冲突导致股市动荡，德国防务技术公司Vincorion仍将于本周在法兰克福正式启动首次公开募股（IPO）的营销活动。【原文：German defense technology firm Vincorion is set to begin formally marketing its initial public offering in Frankfurt this week, despite equity markets being roiled by conflict in the Middle East, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 苹果推出iPhone 17e和搭载M4芯片的iPad Air，开启新品浪潮
item.description: 苹果公司发布了最新款低端智能手机iPhone 17e以及性能更强的iPad Air，由此掀起新一轮产品浪潮。【原文：Apple Inc. unveiled the iPhone 17e, the latest version of its lower-end smartphone, and a faster version of the iPad Air, kicking off a wave of new products.】

item.title: 巴西奥里杰姆公司转向地下天然气储存以增强电网
item.description: 巴西能源公司Origem Energia SA计划在该国地下岩洞储存天然气，以此作为价格对冲策略，旨在支撑该国依赖可再生能源的电网，并吸引耗电量巨大的数据中心。【原文：Origem Energia SA plans to store natural gas in caverns in Brazil in a price hedging strategy to shore up the nation’s renewable-reliant grid and attract power-hungry data centers.】
